items.title: EIP-7918: Blob Base Fee Bounded by Execution Cost
items.description: Imposes a reserve price (BLOB_BASE_COST=2^13 * base_fee_per_gas) on blobs via an if-clause in calc_excess_blob_gas(). Ensures the blob fee market functions properly and blob consumers pay a relevant fraction of the market rate for compute.

items.title: EIP-7934: RLP Execution Block Size Limit
items.description: Introduces a protocol-level cap on max RLP-encoded execution block size to 10 MiB (MAX_BLOCK_SIZE), with a 2 MiB safety margin for beacon blocks, yielding MAX_RLP_BLOCK_SIZE of ~8 MiB.
